# AI Compass

AI Compass is a Chinese and English AI tools directory and daily AI news site.

Site URL: https://kjc613.cn/
Sitemap: https://kjc613.cn/sitemap.xml
News page: https://kjc613.cn/news.html
About page: https://kjc613.cn/about.html
Privacy policy: https://kjc613.cn/privacy.html
Terms: https://kjc613.cn/terms.html
Contact: https://kjc613.cn/contact.html

Main topics:
- AI tools and official website links
- AI coding tools and developer workflows
- AI agents and automation
- AI image, video, voice, and generation workflows
- Daily AI news from official blogs and technology media

Important guide pages:
- https://kjc613.cn/topics/best-ai-coding-tools.html
- https://kjc613.cn/topics/free-ai-tools.html
- https://kjc613.cn/topics/china-ai-tools.html
- https://kjc613.cn/topics/ai-model-api-platforms.html
- https://kjc613.cn/topics/comfyui-tools.html
- https://kjc613.cn/topics/openrouter-guide.html
